invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破93000（基于ATR 413.8247和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score转为正值超过50%（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 93000 (based on ATR 413.8247 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score turns positive above 50% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破890（基于ATR 3.6878和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score转为正值超过-50%（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 890 (based on ATR 3.6878 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score turns positive above -50% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破135（基于ATR 1.0448和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score转为正值超过-20%（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 135 (based on ATR 1.0448 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score turns positive above -20% (indicating short pressure easing).
